TEXT.citation: Wikipedia contributors. (2026). Seediq Wikipedia. Wikimedia Foundation. Retrieved 2026-06-09, from https://trv.wikipedia.org/
TEXT.BibTeX_citation: @misc{Wiki_trv, title = {Seediq Wikipedia}, author = {{Wikipedia contributors}}, year = {2026}, publisher = {Wikimedia Foundation}, url = {https://trv.wikipedia.org/}, urldate = {2026-06-09} }

S.FORM: Kari Dame Doriq uxe de kesun daha Kari Igiris we , we kingal klegan na krkari Intu-Owcow. Mrengo kari Dame ka seediq Igiris, Amirika, Awco ma Kanada. 4000 mang kana hei ka tnkari Dame. Alang skari Kari Dame Igiris Amirika Awco Kanada Dndulan Kari Kari Amirika Kari Awco Kari Kanada Patis Pnskngalan Hnghengak Hengak Bubu Duma kari Igiris Kari Beyax Pusu Bobo Dheran All human beings are born free and equal in dignity and rights. They are endowed with reason and conscience and should act towards one another in a spirit of brotherhood. "Kana seediq bobo dheran nii we, traguh kndalax pnttingan ta; mntena ka beyax pusu ta. Pniqan gnkela ka knkingal seediq, kiya ka, asi ta ka mntena mptswayi mggaalu ma mptbale msuupu." (Tg1 patis, Kari Beyax Pusu Bobo Dheran) Papak
S.PHON: ka…ĺi dam…ô do…ĺiq ux…ô d…ô k…ôsun dańßa ka…ĺi igi…ĺis w…ô , w…ô kiŇčal kl…ôgan na k…ĺka…ĺi intu-ow ¶ow. m…ĺ…ôŇčo ka…ĺi dam…ô ka s…ô…ôdiq igi…ĺis, ami…ĺika, aw ¶o ma kanada. **** maŇč kana ńß…ôi ka tnka…ĺi dam…ô. alaŇč ska…ĺi ka…ĺi dam…ô igi…ĺis ami…ĺika aw ¶o kanada dndulan ka…ĺi ka…ĺi ami…ĺika ka…ĺi aw ¶o ka…ĺi kanada patis pnskŇčalan ńßŇčńß…ôŇčak ńß…ôŇčak bubu duma ka…ĺi igi…ĺis ka…ĺi b…ôax pusu bobo dńß…ô…ĺan all ńßuman b…ôiŇčs a…ĺ…ô bo…ĺn *…ĺ…ô…ô and …ôqual in dignitj and …ĺigńßts. tńß…ô a…ĺ…ô …ôndow…ôd witńß …ĺ…ôason and ¶ons ¶i…ôn ¶…ô and sńßould a ¶t towa…ĺds on…ô anotńß…ô…ĺ in a spi…ĺit o* b…ĺotńß…ô…ĺńßood. "kana s…ô…ôdiq bobo dńß…ô…ĺan nii w…ô, t…ĺaguńß kndalax pnttiŇčan ta; mnt…ôna ka b…ôax pusu ta. pniqan gnk…ôla ka knkiŇčal s…ô…ôdiq, kija ka, asi ta ka mnt…ôna mptswaji mggaalu ma mptbal…ô msuupu." (tg* patis, ka…ĺi b…ôax pusu bobo dńß…ô…ĺan) papak
S.FORM: Kari Dame Doriq uxe de kesun daha Kari Igiris we , we kingal klegan na krkari Intu-Owcow. Mrengo kari Dame ka seediq Igiris, Amirika, Awco ma Kanada. 4000 mang kana hei ka tnkari Dame. Alang skari Kari Dame Igiris Amirika Awco Kanada Dndulan Kari Kari Amirika Kari Awco Kari Kanada Patis Pnskngalan Hnghengak Hengak Bubu Duma kari Igiris Kari Beyax Pusu Bobo Dheran All human beings are born free and equal in dignity and rights. They are endowed with reason and conscience and should act towards one another in a spirit of brotherhood. "Kana seediq bobo dheran nii we, traguh kndalax pnttingan ta; mntena ka beyax pusu ta. Pniqan gnkela ka knkingal seediq, kiya ka, asi ta ka mntena mptswayi mggaalu ma mptbale msuupu." (Tg1 patis, Kari Beyax Pusu Bobo Dheran) Papak
S.PHON: ka…ĺi dam…ô do…ĺiq ux…ô d…ô k…ôsun dańßa ka…ĺi igi…ĺis w…ô , w…ô kiŇčal kl…ôgan na k…ĺka…ĺi intu-ow ¶ow. m…ĺ…ôŇčo ka…ĺi dam…ô ka s…ô…ôdiq igi…ĺis, ami…ĺika, aw ¶o ma kanada. **** maŇč kana ńß…ôi ka tnka…ĺi dam…ô. alaŇč ska…ĺi ka…ĺi dam…ô igi…ĺis ami…ĺika aw ¶o kanada dndulan ka…ĺi ka…ĺi ami…ĺika ka…ĺi aw ¶o ka…ĺi kanada patis pnskŇčalan ńßŇčńß…ôŇčak ńß…ôŇčak bubu duma ka…ĺi igi…ĺis ka…ĺi b…ôax pusu bobo dńß…ô…ĺan all ńßuman b…ôiŇčs a…ĺ…ô bo…ĺn *…ĺ…ô…ô and …ôqual in dignitj and …ĺigńßts. tńß…ô a…ĺ…ô …ôndow…ôd witńß …ĺ…ôason and ¶ons ¶i…ôn ¶…ô and sńßould a ¶t towa…ĺds on…ô anotńß…ô…ĺ in a spi…ĺit o* b…ĺotńß…ô…ĺńßood. "kana s…ô…ôdiq bobo dńß…ô…ĺan nii w…ô, t…ĺaguńß kndalax pnttiŇčan ta; mnt…ôna ka b…ôax pusu ta. pniqan gnk…ôla ka knkiŇčal s…ô…ôdiq, kija ka, asi ta ka mnt…ôna mptswaji mggaalu ma mptbal…ô msuupu." (tg* patis, ka…ĺi b…ôax pusu bobo dńß…ô…ĺan) papak
